content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.05%, India VIX +2.83% to 17.09 — risk-off tone but isolated to financials/PSU banks while IT/Pharma/FMCG hold up. Many held names had post-Q4 rallies on May 6-7 and are consolidating today; book is strongly profitable on a mark-to-market basis. Priority is locking gains via SL trails on extended winners (PNBHOUSING, COFORGE, POLYCAB, BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG, SRF, MARICO, PIDILITIND) rather than chasing new entries into a soft tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +10.4%, SL already at 1072.12 (~1.4% below CMP 1086.80) gives proper trail-gap. No-op MODIFY would not move the needle; SL already locks in ~+9% gain. HOLD logic — emitting MODIFY with same values would be wasted signal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1072.12 already locks +8.9% on +10.4% unrealized; trail-gap 1.3% below CMP is at the floor of Rule 18(c) — any tighter would self-stop on intraday noise. Bullish thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, sub-Bajaj-Housing valuation, +30% in a month) intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, -0.6% unrealized. SL 121.00 (-2.6% below CMP) appropriate for safe-haven hedge in VIX-rising tape. No new info. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.0%, CMP 828.20 well above entry 820. Per Rule trail-mandate (a): unrealized gain ~1% — not yet at +2% trigger but VWAP 830 holding, fresh ATH on Q4 beat (revenue +22%, PAT +18%). Move SL from 818 to entry 820 (breakeven) — converts to risk-free trade. Trail-gap 1.0% below CMP exactly at floor; acceptable on a low-volatility FMCG name. R:R from here ≥1.5."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +8.0%, massive +17% gap-up day on Q4 (PAT 612 vs 261 YoY, order book record $1.75bn, FY27 EBITDA >20.5% guide). SL 1341.52 already trailed (~2% below CMP 1368.70), locks +6.5%. No-op MODIFY — keeping for clarity. Target 1420 still ~3.7% upside, R:R from current SL acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1341.52 sits 1.99% below CMP 1368.70 — at trail-gap floor, locks +6.5% on +8% unrealized. Tightening further risks self-stopout on intraday chop after a 17% one-day move. Bullish thesis intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.3%, CMP 3065. SL 3030 already at near-breakeven (-1.1% below CMP). Defence theme strong, NGC contract pending. Stored SL adequate; HOLD logic captured as no-op MODIFY entry not needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 vs CMP 3065 — gap 1.1% (below floor of 1% mandate margin), but tightening would risk same-session stop on a defence name with NGC catalyst pending. Rule 18(c) floor met. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.9%. Stored SL 825 already locks +2.4% (1.7% below CMP 839.40). Per trail-mandate (a) at +2% gain SL should be at/above entry — already done. No further tightening warranted; would breach 1% trail-gap floor. HOLD via no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 825 sits 1.7% below CMP 839.40, locks +2.4% gain on +3.9% unrealized. Q4 EBITDA margin all-time high 46.5%, AUM +21% YoY. Trail-gap at safe distance. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held flat. SL 1445 (3.0% below CMP 1491.30), target 1575. Q4 PAT +37%, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin +280bps — strong. Trade just placed, give it room. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7% on intraday wobble after yesterday's +12% Q4 turnaround pop. SL 1580 (1.8% below CMP) — within risk budget. Rule 17: do NOT panic-exit on intraday noise; SL was sized to absorb chop. Zaynich NDA + Q4 turnaround thesis intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.1%, fresh entry. SL 2745 (-1.6% below CMP 2790.60), target 2920. Q4 strong (FY26 PAT +47%), Odisha refrigerant capex doubled. HOLD — let it develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.2%, fresh post-results entry. SL 9020 (-1.1% below CMP 9123.50), target 9550. Q4 record revenue, market share gains, net cash +70%. Within trail-gap floor. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.9%. SL 1955 (-2.2% below CMP 1999.50), target 2110. Q4 noisy on exceptional charge but defence segment +46%, FY27 ~25% guidance. NA Class 8 truck weakness is overhang but already known at entry. SL absorbs chop. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.4%. SL 354 (-2.6% below CMP 363.55), target 384. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +16%, lending book +32%. Intraday consolidation after May 5 surge. SL absorbs chop. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.8%. CMP 10695 vs entry 10760 — modest pullback after fresh 52w high 10785 hit at 11:45. SL 10440 (-2.4% below CMP), target 11260. Buyback at 12000 + Rs 150 dividend + Q4 PAT +34%. Strong thesis; SL absorbs intraday give-back. HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1072.12, "reasoning": "SL already at +8.9% lock-in, trail-gap at floor. No tighten without self-stop risk."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL appropriate for ETF."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven on +1% unrealized at fresh ATH; converts to risk-free."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1341.52, "reasoning": "SL already trailed to +6.5% lock-in. Further tighten risks self-stop after 17% gap day."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3030.00, "reasoning": "SL near breakeven, defence catalyst pending."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +2.4%, at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1445.00, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, give room to develop."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Intraday noise post-Q4 pop; SL absorbs chop."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2745.00, "reasoning": "Fresh entry on Q4 strength."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020.00, "reasoning": "Fresh entry on Q4 record results."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "SL absorbs intraday wobble; defence thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354.00, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, intraday consolidation acceptable."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440.00, "reasoning": "Buyback + dividend catalyst, SL at -2.4% absorbs pullback."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rule 18 audit of qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates (deployment 61% — within 80% soft target band but room exists): (1) WOCKPHARMA (+0.04) — already HELD, no add. (2) POLYCAB, PIDILITIND, COFORGE, MARICO, BAJAJ-AUTO, ABCAPITAL, CAMS, GRSE, BHARATFORG, SRF, PNBHOUSING — all already HELD. (3) RAMCOCEM BEARISH -0.07 — reject. (4) APOLLOTYRE BEARISH -0.07 + board meeting May 14 (4 sessions away, just outside Rule 11 3-session window but tight) — reject. New-entry candidates from research that are NOT in book: none with bullish modifier ≥+0.05 outside held names. Existing OPEN orders: DABUR BUY @ 487 placed 6h ago (DABUR CMP not in this batch; Q4 +15% YoY thesis still valid — leave working); HFCL BUY @ 133.50 MIS placed 57h ago — STALE, MIS limit from prior session cannot fill, but cannot CANCEL via decision schema directly here. Note: deployment at 61% with 13 positions already constitutes a well-diversified book; admit-side discipline is satisfied by holdings already covering BFSI/IT/FMCG/Pharma/Capital Goods/Defence/Chem/Auto.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong unrealized P&L day (+₹11,229 / +1.24% MTM) driven by Q4 results clustering across Coforge (+8%), PNBHOUSING (+10.4%), CAMS (+3.9%), Marico (+1.0%). Daily loss budget fully intact. Risk discipline: chose to TRAIL Marico to breakeven (only one new MODIFY this cycle — converts +1% trade to risk-free) rather than aggressively tighten SLs on multi-percent winners where stored SLs already sit at the 1-2% trail-gap floor. Per Rule 18(c) trail-gap floor: tightening SLs already within 2% of CMP would risk Day-10/Day-11-style self-induced exits on intraday noise. Position count 13 + 1 working order (DABUR) — book breadth adequate. No new admits this cycle: every BULLISH watchlist candidate is already represented. VIX rising into a soft Nifty tape argues for capital preservation over fresh deployment in the final 100 minutes; if any winner trips its trail SL, that is the plan executing, not a failure."
}
